_comment: Closed-world deterministic baseline for the CodeQL scan. 'counts' must match exactly per (rule, file basename); 'forbidden' must be zero; any undeclared (rule, file) finding fails the build. Matched by ruleId + file basename (robust to line shifts). Baseline captured from run 28025120189 (81 alerts). Update intentionally when models/endpoints change.

counts.why: full result4k API coverage, one inline sink per endpoint
handlebarsXss(2)+applyWriter(1)+applyContext(2)+applyContextMap(2); renderToResponse does NOT fire (ViewModel field-flow limitation)
bonus XSS: SSRF endpoints echo input into the response body
CONTROL: unsanitized load() must alert (twin of pathResolvedWithinRoot)
VERIFY: uriToString(1)+uriCopyThis(1)+uriCopyArg(1); multiFrom* and methodEcho do NOT fire — investigating
NATIVE: CodeQL 2.24.0+ covers commons-fileupload natively — all 4 endpoints fire without custom models
NATIVE: CodeQL covers FreeMarker SSTI natively (1 of 2 SSTI endpoints); XSS via data model NOT tracked
CONTROL: jsoupParseText + jsoupParseHtml — taint through parse/text/html summaries
fromNullable→orNull + getOrElse fire; map→orNull chain may not propagate

forbidden.why: TREATMENT: identical to control except resolvedWithinRoot() barrier; must be suppressed
http4k strips CR/LF in header() (sanitizeHeader->withoutCrLf); sink removed
TREATMENT: Jsoup.clean(input, Safelist.none()) barrier strips HTML
